caption: DY+jets and TTBar reducible-background diagnostics across the predeclared sideband and signal regions. TTBar/DY ratios are {'high_sideband_140_170': 0.16348247967166454, 'low_sideband_70_105': 0.09536477980847097, 'signal_window_105_140': 0.04440264879971137}, so TTBar is not promoted to the nominal fake model by the Phase 2 thresholds.
description: DY+jets and TTBar reducible-background diagnostics across the predeclared sideband and signal regions. TTBar/DY ratios are {'high_sideband_140_170': 0.16348247967166454, 'low_sideband_70_105': 0.09536477980847097, 'signal_window_105_140': 0.04440264879971137}, so TTBar is not promoted to the nominal fake model by the Phase 2 thresholds.

metadata.rule: promote if TTBar/DY >= 10% in signal window or >= 20% in either sideband

caption: Angular reconstruction closure summary showing the maximum per-sample median absolute mass difference for recomputed four-vector quantities. All medians are far below the 0.1 GeV closure gate and all angular physical-range checks have zero out-of-range entries.
description: Angular reconstruction closure summary showing the maximum per-sample median absolute mass difference for recomputed four-vector quantities. All medians are far below the 0.1 GeV closure gate and all angular physical-range checks have zero out-of-range entries.

caption: VBF recovery and downscope evidence from branch inventories and allowed join sources. No checked flat ntuple contains real jet or VBF discriminator branches, no allowed upstream join source exists, and no lepton-only category is labeled VBF.
description: VBF recovery and downscope evidence from branch inventories and allowed join sources. No checked flat ntuple contains real jet or VBF discriminator branches, no allowed upstream join source exists, and no lepton-only category is labeled VBF.

metadata.decision: Formal downscope: no real jet or VBF discriminator branches are available in allowed flat ntuples.

caption: S1 final-state category viability summary for the fit window. The 4mu, 4e, and 2e2mu categories are retained as the nominal simultaneous-fit categories, while S2 classifier categories fail low-stat viability.
description: S1 final-state category viability summary for the fit window. The 4mu, 4e, and 2e2mu categories are retained as the nominal simultaneous-fit categories, while S2 classifier categories fail low-stat viability.

caption: S1 and S2 approach comparison using the common Asimov counting precision proxy. The nominal choice is `S1_reference_like_final_state_categories` because S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates.
description: S1 and S2 approach comparison using the common Asimov counting precision proxy. The nominal choice is `S1_reference_like_final_state_categories` because S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates.

S1_reference_like_cut_and_channel_fit.category_viability: passes final-state categories; see cutflow and fit_inputs_s1.json

S2_angular_kinematic_classifier_categori.reason: S2 promoted only if best model passes score/viability/overtraining gates and improves expected mu uncertainty proxy by >10%.

metadata.common_metric: Asimov counting precision proxy sqrt(S+B)/S in 105 < m4l < 140 GeV, plus D7/GoF/category gates
metadata.selection_reason: S1 retained because S2 did not pass all input, score-shape, low-stat, overtraining, or >10% improvement gates.
